writing_guidelines.main_body_strategy: Dense, precise writing. Every sentence should carry information. Avoid filler.
writing_guidelines.figure_strategy: Figures must be readable in print (no thin lines, adequate font sizes). Use vector graphics when possible.
writing_guidelines.table_strategy: Use booktabs style. Bold best results. Include standard deviations.
writing_guidelines.proof_strategy: Sketch in main body, full proofs in appendix.
writing_guidelines.related_work_placement: After introduction or before conclusion (both accepted).

common_pitfalls: Exceeding 9-page main body limit (references/appendix are unlimited)
Missing broader impact or limitations discussion
Figures too small to read in two-column format
Not anonymizing the submission (no author names, no github links)
